prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
prompt_user:
## Task
For transformer T-020, combine DGA diagnostics with thermal anomaly trends to decide whether to schedule immediate outage maintenance or defer with heightened monitoring.

## Expected Behaviour (Characteristic Answer)
The answer should integrate DGA-based diagnosis and trend/anomaly evidence, make a binary maintenance decision (immediate outage vs deferred monitoring), and provide an actionable work-order or monitoring plan.

## Agent Plan
(no plan)

## Agent Trajectory (tool calls and results)
[
  {
    "turn": 1,
    "role": "assistant",
    "content": "",
    "tool_calls": [
      {
        "name": "analyze_dga",
        "arguments": {
          "c2h2": 200,
          "c2h4": 100,
          "c2h6": 50,
          "ch4": 150,
          "h2": 50,
          "transformer_id": "T-020"
        },
        "call_id": "chatcmpl-tool-975124786c4dcbb7",
        "output": {
          "type": "text",
          "text": "{\n  \"iec_code\": \"N\",\n  \"diagnosis\": \"Normal / Inconclusive\",\n  \"r1_ch4_h2\": 3.0,\n  \"r2_c2h2_c2h4\": 2.0,\n  \"r3_c2h4_c2h6\": 2.0,\n  \"input_gases\": {\n    \"h2_ppm\": 50.0,\n    \"ch4_ppm\": 150.0,\n    \"c2h2_ppm\": 200.0,\n    \"c2h4_ppm\": 100.0,\n    \"c2h6_ppm\": 50.0\n  },\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-020\"\n}"
        }
      },
      {
        "name": "trend_analysis",
        "arguments": {
          "end_time": "2022-01-01",
          "sensor_id": "winding_temp_c",
          "start_time": "2022-01-01",
          "transformer_id": "T-020"
        },
        "call_id": "chatcmpl-tool-92526417de136d74",
        "output": {
          "type": "text",
          "text": "{\n  \"error\": \"No readings for transformer='T-020' sensor='winding_temp_c'.\"\n}"
        }
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "turn": 2,
    "role": "assistant",
    "content": "In this case, the trend analysis for the winding temperature sensor is not available for the specified time period, so we cannot proceed with the analysis.\n\nHowever, the DGA analysis suggests a normal or inconclusive diagnosis.",
    "tool_calls": []
  }
]

## Agent Final Answer
In this case, the trend analysis for the winding temperature sensor is not available for the specified time period, so we cannot proceed with the analysis.

However, the DGA analysis suggests a normal or inconclusive diagnosis.

---
Evaluate across the six dimensions below. For each dimension output true (good) or false (bad).
"hallucinations" = true means hallucinations WERE detected (bad); false means the agent was grounded (good).

Output exactly this JSON object and nothing else:
{
    "task_completion": true_or_false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true_or_false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true_or_false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true_or_false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true_or_false,
    "hallucinations": true_or_false,
    "suggestions": "brief actionable note, or empty string if none"
}
raw_response:
{
    "task_completion": false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": false,
    "generalized_result_verification": false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true,
    "hallucinations": false,
    "suggestions": "The agent should have handled the missing trend analysis data more effectively and provided a maintenance decision based on available DGA results."
}

parsed_dims.suggestions: The agent should have handled the missing trend analysis data more effectively and provided a maintenance decision based on available DGA results.
